title: Common Sense: Saws
description: This adds saws that is used to turn logs into planks
body:
Like to make it harder to get planks? Well, why not have saws. Saws are a crafting tool that is used as an axe to cut trees and used to turn logs and wood blocks into planks. Giving that feel of progression to your world.

There is 5 types of saws
flint, Stone, iron, diamond, and netherite

The netherite saw does not take damage while crafting logs and wood into planks
